title: UGC (User Generated Content) Creator Agreement
description: A creative contract for User Generated Content (UGC) campaigns, transferring copyright and advertising licensing usage rights to the brand for paid ad use.
whatsCovered: Definition of UGC video/image deliverables and aspect ratios
Brand ownership and raw file transfer guidelines
Full digital advertising licensing rights (typically 12 months)
Compensation payouts and raw footage usage options
Mutual confidentiality and brand safety covenants
whenToUse: Use this agreement when you are hired by a brand to create raw video clips (unboxing, reviews, product demos) intended for the brand's paid social ads rather than your own page posts.

fields.label: Brand Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Beauty Way, Suite 400, New York, NY 10012

fields.label: UGC Video Deliverables Description
fields.placeholder: e.g. Three (3) 9:16 TikTok-style review videos, each between 15-30 seconds, covering the facial serum product...

clauses.heading: USER GENERATED CONTENT AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This UGC Creator Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {brand_name}, located at {brand_address} ("Brand"), and {creator_name}, located at {creator_address} ("Creator").

clauses.heading: 1. Creative Deliverables
clauses.body: Creator agrees to script, record, and deliver the following custom digital content: {deliverables_desc}. All raw videos must be delivered in high-definition 9:16 format via Google Drive or Dropbox links.

clauses.heading: 2. Compensation
clauses.body: Brand shall pay Creator a flat fee of {payment_rate} as full compensation for the creative work. Payment shall be sent within 15 days of content delivery and technical QA verification.

clauses.heading: 3. Advertising Usage Rights
clauses.body: Creator hereby grants Brand a worldwide, royalty-free, exclusive license for a period of 12 months to use, edit, cut, and run the deliverables as paid social media advertising (Meta, TikTok, Pinterest ads) across all channels.

clauses.heading: 3.1 Raw Footage Rights Transfer
clauses.body: In addition to the edited deliverables, Creator agrees to transfer all rights to the raw, unedited camera video clips to Brand, which may be repurposed into new ad variations.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is the difference between UGC and Influencer marketing?
faq.answer: Influencer marketing requires posting the sponsored content to your own social channels. UGC creators produce content for the brand to post on their own profiles or run as paid advertisements.

faq.question: Can I repost UGC content on my personal feeds?
faq.answer: Unless otherwise agreed, you can post snippets for your portfolio, but the commercial rights are licensed exclusively to the brand during the campaign term.
